prestazioni: Engine swap to a **GM 250-S (4.1L inline-6, engine code: 250-S)** with forged internals from **JE Pistons (8.5:1 compression, 4.030" bore, 3.75" stroke)** and **Manley Performance forged connecting rods (6.000" length, H-beam design)**. Pair with a **Holley Sniper EFI (2x4 throttle bodies, 1,000 CFM)** and **MSD 6AL ignition system** for precise fuel and spark control.

Forced induction via **Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, ball-bearing, 35mm wastegate)** on a custom **Turbonetics cast manifold (T3 flange, 304 stainless steel)**. Intercooled with a **GReddy Type-S front-mount intercooler (600hp capacity, 3.5" core thickness)** and **Tial MV-R 50mm blow-off valve**. Supporting mods include a **Moroso oil pan (7-quart capacity, baffled)** and **Mocal oil cooler (19-row, 13-row stacked plate)**.

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 2.5" inverted monotube design)** and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear, hollow core)**. Braking upgraded to **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (355mm rotors, 2-piece floating design)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (fiberglass, 3-piece overfenders, 50mm wider front, 70mm wider rear)** with **custom carbon fiber front splitter (3D-molded, 45mm overhang)** and **custom aluminum rear diffuser (integrated exhaust cutouts, 3-piece design)**. Painted in **PPG Vibrance Collection "Lime Squeeze" (3-stage pearl, matte clear coat)** with **blacked-out trim (vinyl wrap, 3M 1080 Gloss Black)**.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Recaro SP-G buckets (FIA-approved, carbon-Kevlar shell, 5-point harnesses)** and **custom aluminum dashboard (CNC-machined, brushed finish, analog gauges from Defi Advance BF series)**. Roll cage by **Custom Cages (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, 8-point design, bolt-in rear section)** with **Sparco 6-point harnesses (ASM homologation)**.

Lightweight **carbon fiber hood (RTM process, 1.5mm thickness, 50% weight reduction)** with **functional NACA ducts (dual 4" inlets, ram-air to intercooler)**. Wheels: **BBS LM-R (17x9 +25 front, 17x10.5 +35 rear, 3-piece forged, 5x120 PCD)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear, semi-slick compound)**.
